package.name: rl_envs_cube_tracker
package.description: Real-side cube pose publisher for rl_environments push / PnP task envs. Wraps apriltag_ros and republishes the detected cube tag as a geometry_msgs/PoseStamped on /cube_pose (optionally TF-transformed into the robot base frame). Robot-agnostic — works with RX200, NED2, UR5e.
